title: RM18,000 Raised: Light Up 7 Supports 140 Refugee Families This Ramadan in Malaysia
description: In the spirit of Ramadan, Light Up 7 carried out a CSR initiative in Malaysia, raising RM18,000 to support over 140 refugee families with essential aid, bringing relief, joy, and hope during the holy month.

page_content.html_content:
In the spirit of Ramadan, a time that calls for compassion, reflection, and generosity, Light Up 7 carried out a corporate social responsibility (CSR) initiative in Malaysia in partnership with Carefugees Malaysia and Youth Empowerment Malaysia to support underserved refugee communities.

Behind every number is a story. Families doing their best to rebuild, parents finding ways to provide, and children holding on to small moments of joy despite uncertainty. This initiative was shaped by a simple intention, to stand alongside these families with care, dignity, and compassion during the holy month.


Powered by Our People

This initiative was not only driven by Light Up 7 as an organisation, but also made possible through the collective effort of our team. Many of our staff came together to contribute towards this cause, reflecting a shared spirit of generosity and compassion within the company. Their contributions played a meaningful role in bringing this initiative to life. It is a reminder that real impact is created when people come together with a common purpose to give back.


Supporting Refugee Families During Ramadan

Through this CSR initiative in Malaysia, Light Up 7 contributed RM18,000.00, supporting over 140 refugee families with essential food aid and basic necessities for sahur and iftar.

For many families, this support meant more than just meals. It brought a sense of relief, stability, and the comfort of knowing they were not alone during Ramadan.


Bringing Joy to Children

Beyond essential support, the initiative also created small but meaningful moments for children within the community. Part of the RM18,000.00 contribution was used to provide snacks and toys, bringing smiles during Ramadan.

A simple snack, a toy, or a shared smile can turn an ordinary day into something memorable. These moments remind us that even the smallest acts of kindness can mean so much.


The Power of Collaboration

This CSR initiative was made possible through the efforts of Carefugees Malaysia and Youth Empowerment Malaysia, whose on-ground coordination ensured that aid was delivered effectively to those in need.

The collaboration reflects how partnerships between organisations can strengthen community outreach efforts and create real impact for refugee families in Malaysia.


Light Up 7 Commitment to Corporate Social Responsibility

At Light Up 7, we believe that business goes beyond delivering creative and brand experiences. We are committed to contributing to society through CSR initiatives, community engagement, and social impact efforts in Malaysia.

This Ramadan, our contribution represents compassion, shared responsibility, and a continued commitment to uplifting communities in need.

We are grateful for the opportunity to give back and remain committed to expanding our efforts in Malaysia in the years ahead.


See the smiles and moments that made this initiative meaningful!
